codeReview.summary: Rerun pass: the prior blocking issue is resolved in current code paths. `web/app/page.tsx` now sources 24h change from `usePriceChange` (candle-derived) and wires it into `TokenHeader`, while token header/chart/range/hover/loading-empty behaviors remain implemented.

issues.description: `LightweightChart` accepts `containerRef` but ignores it (`containerRef: _externalRef`), and `PriceChart` still creates/passes a ref only for that prop. This dead prop/ref path can be removed to reduce complexity.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Skill resolution remains inconsistent: feature metadata specifies `frontend-ui-worker`, but the transcript shows Skill-tool lookup failed and the worker had to fall back to reading SKILL.md directly.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session `cedfeecc-e835-448b-b16a-e3852838c087` contains `Error: Skill "frontend-ui-worker" not found`; skill file exists at /Users/maxmohammadi/cash-orderbook/.factory/skills/frontend-ui-worker/SKILL.md.

summary: Pass on rerun: the 24h change is now computed from candle data via `usePriceChange` and wired into the token header, so no blocking requirements remain for token-header-chart.
